video_candidate.background_removal_notes: Excellent contrast against the dark grey tower interior. The smoke trail trailing behind the missile needs to be carefully excluded during extraction.
video_candidate.why_this_moment: The missile is clearly visible in mid-air with high contrast against the dark background, making it ideal for extraction.
